arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Timestream table.

creation_time.description: The time when the Timestream table was created.

last_updated_time.description: The time when the Timestream table was last updated.

magnetic_store_write_properties.description: Properties that define how data is written to the magnetic store, including the configuration for rejected data location.

retention_properties.description: The retention properties of the table, specifying how long data is stored in memory and magnetic stores.

schema.description: The schema of the Timestream table, defining the structure of the data with partition keys.

table_status.description: The current status of the Timestream table (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETING).
